description: Create crates/oai-runner/src/tools/ module with definitions.rs, executor.rs, file_ops.rs, search.rs, bash.rs. Tools: read_file (path, offset, limit), write_file (path, content), edit_file (path, old_text, new_text), list_files (pattern, path), search_files (pattern, path, include), execute_command (command, timeout_secs). Each tool has JSON Schema definition for OpenAI function calling. Executor dispatches by name, returns string result. Path traversal prevention: reject paths with .. escaping working dir. All file ops relative to --working-dir.
title: Implement native tool definitions and executor
